name: Gotland County (Sweden)

colors.symbolism: the azure field of the Gotland arms

description: A square blue flag charged centrally with the silver Agnus Dei (Lamb of God) bearing a banner with a red cross, the historic emblem of Gotland.
history: The flag is the heraldic banner of the arms of Gotland County, derived from the medieval coat of arms of the historic island province of Gotland; the Agnus Dei has been the symbol of Gotland since the 13th century.

features.symbolism: the azure field of the historic Gotland provincial arms

features.role: Agnus Dei (Lamb of God) of Gotland, holding a banner with a red cross
features.symbolism: the silver Lamb of God carrying a banner charged with a red cross, the historic emblem of the island province of Gotland; symbolizes Christ as the sacrificial lamb.
